evals.prompt: Production SQL Server had an outage last night. Here is the current ERRORLOG and ERRORLOG.1. Walk me through what happened.
evals.expected_output: Timeline of events with AG failover (E1), lease expiry (E2), memory pressure (E9-E14), I/O slow warnings (E15). Root cause linking. Login failure bursts (E22). Recommends companion skills (/clusterlog-review, /hadr-health-review) where appropriate.

evals.prompt: I see hundreds of 'Login failed for user' messages in the ERRORLOG between 02:15 and 02:25. What is this?
evals.expected_output: E22 login failure burst detection with rate analysis. Distinguishes between brute force, app config issue, expired credentials, and AD outage. References /spn-review if Kerberos errors are present.
